title: Image class — Image
text: Apply Sobel operator compute image gradients. Returns   new Image.

title: Image class — Image
code: Image$sobel(   dx,   dy,   ksize = 3,   ddepth = NULL,   scale = 1,   delta = 0,   border_type = "reflect_101" )

title: Image class — Image
text: dx Non-negative integer. Order x derivative. dy Non-negative integer. Order y derivative. dx + dy must >= 1. ksize Integer. Sobel kernel aperture size: 1, 3, 5, 7. limit 7 OpenCV requirement. ddepth Character. Output depth: "CV_16S", "CV_32F", "CV_64F". Default NULL (depth inferred input; message emitted). scale Single positive numeric. Optional scale factor computed derivatives. Must positive (use convert_depth + arithmetic invert gradient sign). Default 1. delta Single numeric. Optional delta added results storing. Default 0. border_type Character. fill pixels outside image boundary. "reflect_101" (default) mirrors image excluding edge pixel (e.g. dcb|abcde|dcb); "reflect" mirrors including edge pixel (e.g. edcb|abcde|edcb); "replicate" repeats nearest edge pixel; "constant" fills fixed value (0, .e. black). "wrap" supported OpenCV operations.

title: Image class — Image
code: \donttest{ img_path <- system.file("img", "brick_wall.jpg", package = "Retina") img <- Image$new(img_path) grad_x <- img$sobel(1, 0) grad_x$plot() }

Must positive (use convert_depth + arithmetic invert gradient sign). Default 1. delta Single numeric. Delta added results. Default 0. border_type Character. fill pixels outside image boundary. "reflect_101" (default) mirrors image excluding edge pixel (e.g. dcb|abcde|dcb); "reflect" mirrors including edge pixel (e.g. edcb|abcde|edcb); "replicate" repeats nearest edge pixel; "constant" fills fixed value (0, .e. black). "wrap" supported OpenCV operations.

code: Image$filter2D(   kernel,   ddepth = NULL,   anchor = NULL,   delta = 0,   border_type = "reflect_101" )

title: Image class — Image
text: kernel Numeric matrix. convolution kernel. Values coerced double. ddepth Character NULL. Output depth. One "CV_8U", "CV_16U", "CV_16S", "CV_32F", "CV_64F". NULL (default), output depth matches input depth (OpenCV -1). anchor NULL (default, kernel centre) length-2 integer vector c(col, row) specifying anchor pixel within kernel (0-based). delta Single numeric. Constant added every output pixel convolution. Default 0. border_type Character. fill pixels outside image boundary. "reflect_101" (default) mirrors image excluding edge pixel (e.g. dcb|abcde|dcb); "reflect" mirrors including edge pixel (e.g. edcb|abcde|edcb); "replicate" repeats nearest edge pixel; "constant" fills fixed value (0, .e. black); "wrap" tiles image boundary.

code: \donttest{ img_path <- system.file("img", "flower.jpg", package = "Retina") img <- Image$new(img_path) sharpen <- matrix(c(0,-1,0,-1,5,-1,0,-1,0), nrow = 3) sharpened <- img$filter2D(sharpen) sharpened$plot() }

title: Image class — Image
text: Apply morphological operation. Returns new Image.

title: Image class — Image
code: Image$morph(   operation,   shape = "rect",   size = 3L,   kernel = NULL,   iterations = 1L,   border_type = "reflect_101" )

title: Image class — Image
text: operation Character. One "erode" (shrinks bright regions), "dilate" (expands bright regions), "open" (erode dilate — removes small bright spots), "close" (dilate erode — fills small dark holes), "gradient" (dilate minus erode — highlights edges), "tophat" (image minus open — isolates bright features smaller kernel), "blackhat" (close minus image — isolates dark features smaller kernel). shape Character. Structuring element shape: "rect", "cross", "ellipse". Ignored kernel supplied. Default "rect". size Positive odd integer. Side length structuring element. Ignored kernel supplied. Default 3L. kernel Optional numeric matrix used structuring element. Values coerced integers. Overrides shape size supplied. iterations Positive integer. primitive operations ("erode", "dilate"), number times operation applied. compound operations ("open", "close", "gradient", "tophat", "blackhat"), internal erosion dilation step repeated iterations times independently (e.g., iterations = 2 "open" erodes twice dilates twice, opens twice). Default 1L. border_type Character. fill pixels outside image boundary. "reflect_101" (default) mirrors image excluding edge pixel (e.g. dcb|abcde|dcb); "reflect" mirrors including edge pixel (e.g. edcb|abcde|edcb); "replicate" repeats nearest edge pixel; "constant" fills fixed value (0, .e. black). "wrap" supported OpenCV morphological operations.

title: Retina 0.1.0
text: Added Image R6 class backed OpenCV cv::Mat / cv::UMat via cpp11. Image$new() constructs file path R array (colorspace depth arguments). Image$write() saves file. Image$copy() produces deep copy. Image$plot() Image$to_native_raster() render images display. Image$to_gpu() / Image$to_cpu() transfer CPU GPU buffers. dim.Image() returns c(nrow, ncol, nchan).

title: Retina 0.1.0
text: Image$convert_depth() / Image$convert_depth_() Image$to_array() convert bit depth export pixel data R arrays. Image$convert_color() / Image$convert_color_() converts color spaces. Convenience shortcuts: $to_gray(), $to_bgr(), $to_hsv(), $to_lab().

title: Retina 0.1.0
text: Image$mean(), $sd(), $var(), $min(), $max(), $sum(), $median(), $quantile() compute per-channel statistics. S3 methods mean.Image, sd.Image, var.Image, min.Image, max.Image, sum.Image, median.Image, quantile.Image registered.

title: Retina 0.1.0
text: Image$add() / $add_(), $subtract() / $subtract_(), $multiply() / $multiply_(), $divide() / $divide_(). Image$absdiff() / $absdiff_(), $add_weighted() / $add_weighted_(). Image$bitwise_and() / $bitwise_and_(), $bitwise_or() / $bitwise_or_(), $bitwise_xor() / $bitwise_xor_(), $bitwise_not() / $bitwise_not_(). Operator overloads: +, -, *, /, bitwAnd(), bitwOr(), bitwXor(), bitwNot().

title: Retina 0.1.0
text: Image$blur() / $blur_() — box filter. Image$gaussian_blur() / $gaussian_blur_() — Gaussian filter. Image$median_blur() / $median_blur_() — median filter. Image$bilateral_filter() / $bilateral_filter_() — edge-preserving smooth.

title: Retina 0.1.0
text: Image$sobel() / $sobel_(), $laplacian() / $laplacian_() — gradient operators. Image$canny() / $canny_() — Canny edge detector.

title: Retina 0.1.0
text: Image$morph() / $morph_() — erode, dilate, open, close, gradient, tophat, blackhat operations custom kernel support.

title: Retina 0.1.0
text: Image$resize() / $resize_(), $rotate() / $rotate_(), $flip() / $flip_(), $crop() / $crop_(). Image$warp_affine() / $warp_affine_() — apply 2×3 affine matrix. Image$warp_perspective() / $warp_perspective_() — apply 3×3 homography. Matrix constructors: affine_translate(), affine_scale(), affine_shear(), affine_rotate(), affine_from_points(), perspective_from_points().

title: Retina 0.1.0
text: split_channels() decomposes multi-channel image named list single-channel images. merge_channels() reassembles named list.

title: Retina 0.1.0
text: [.Image reads single pixel (named vector), single channel (scalar), rectangular region (new Image). Uses 1-based [row, col] indexing. [<-.Image writes single pixel, single channel, rectangular region.

title: Retina 0.1.0
text: Image$fill(), Image$zeros(), Image$ones() — filled constructors. Image$randu(), Image$randn() — random image constructors. Image$border() / $border_() — add border padding. Image$tile() / $tile_() — tile image N×M times. Image$set_to() / $set_to_() — set masked pixels scalar. concatenate() — horizontal vertical image stacking.

title: Retina 0.1.0
text: Image$threshold() / $threshold_() — global threshold 5 types 17 ImageJ auto-threshold methods. Image$adaptive_threshold() / $adaptive_threshold_() — local mean/Gaussian threshold (CV_8U ). Image$in_range() / $in_range_() — per-channel range mask. autothreshold_value() — returns computed threshold value without modifying image.

title: Retina 0.1.0
text: Image$draw_line() / $draw_line_(), $draw_arrow() / $draw_arrow_(). Image$draw_rectangle() / $draw_rectangle_(), $draw_circle() / $draw_circle_(). Image$draw_ellipse() / $draw_ellipse_(), $draw_arc() / $draw_arc_(). Image$draw_polyline() / $draw_polyline_(), $fill_poly() / $fill_poly_(). Image$draw_text() / $draw_text_(). col2bgr() converts R color names / hex strings BGR() numeric vectors. get_text_size() measures text bounding box without drawing.
